title: melastoma barbatum
intro: Melastoma barbatum, also known as the "Tengumis" or "Bunga Tengumis" in Malay, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and stems are rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Melastoma barbatum is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
